symbols.name: EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository
symbols.summary: Provides a read-only generic repository for Entity Framework.

syntax.content: public class EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository : IGenericReadOnlyRepository, IRepository where TEntity : class, IEntity where TDatabaseEntity : class

symbols.summary: Provides a generic read-only repository implementation based on Entity Framework Core.

symbols.name: FindAllAsync(IFindOptions, CancellationToken)

A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable collection of entities of type TEntity.

symbols.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a single entity of type TEntity based on the specified specifications and find options.

syntax.content: public virtual Task FindOneAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of criteria used to filter the entities.
Optional find options to modify query behavior, such as sorting. If null, default options are used.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a single entity of type TEntity if found; otherwise, null.

symbols.name: Logger
symbols.summary: Provides logging capabilities for instances of BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.Repositories.IGenericRepository%601. This property uses a configured Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger%601 to log various repository operations, such as insert, update, and detailed state transitions during the Entity Framework operations.

syntax.content: protected ILogger> Logger { get; }
